---
title: "practica1"
author: "Carlos García"
format: html
---
# Análisis de Componentes Principales (PCA)

## Ejercicio 5.1

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(factoextra)
library(patchwork)
library(corrplot)
```

Dibujamos el biplot de `USArrests`:

```{r}
acp <- prcomp(USArrests, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)
fviz_pca_biplot(acp, repel = TRUE,
               col.var = "#2E9FDF", col.ind = "#696969",
               title = "Biplot de arrestos en EEUU")
```

```{r}

```
